name: matilha-software-arch-pack
description: Matilha companion pack — 17 software-architecture skills (Caminho C) distilled from Danilo-experience on Argos + Gravicode projects. Covers dependency direction + Lambda chain shape, event-driven boundaries, dual-store architecture (Postgres + DynamoDB), bounded contexts without microservice-spaghetti, and disciplined scaling (Ticker patterns, pull-over-push). You lead. Agents hunt.
